pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java compiler source and target version from 1.8 to 11 to support the new JDK.
Upgrade Spring Boot from 1.2.5.RELEASE to 2.3.7.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern framework features.
Add explicit dependency for javax.annotation-api because it was removed from the JDK module system in Java 11.
Replace joda-time and jackson-datatype-joda with jackson-datatype-jsr310 to use the standard Java 8+ Date/Time API.
Remove individual Dropwizard metrics dependencies in favor of the unified jhipster-framework which manages metrics for Spring Boot 2.
Upgrade Swagger/Springfox dependencies to support OpenAPI 3 (springfox-oas) required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Replace the deprecated mongeez library with mongock for MongoDB schema migration, as mongeez is incompatible with newer Spring Data MongoDB versions.
Replace the old embedmongo-spring test dependency with de.flapdoodle.embed.mongo for modern embedded MongoDB testing support.
Update MapStruct dependencies to use the standard mapstruct and mapstruct-processor artifacts instead of the legacy mapstruct-jdk8.
Upgrade from commons-lang (2.x) to commons-lang3 (3.x) to use the actively maintained Apache Commons library.
Change project packaging from war to jar to align with modern Spring Boot executable JAR conventions.
Update various Maven plugin versions (compiler, surefire, failsafe, etc.) to versions compatible with Java 11 and Maven 3.3+.
Introduce jhipster-dependencies BOM to manage transitive dependency versions consistently across the project.
Update groupId and artifactId to reflect the new sample application identity.
Remove deprecated Spring Cloud Connectors dependencies which are no longer supported in modern Spring Boot versions.
Remove legacy metrics reporter dependency in favor of Micrometer.
Add JJWT dependencies to support modern JWT token handling required by the updated security stack.
Add ArchUnit dependencies to enable architectural testing with JUnit 5.
Add Zalando Problem Spring Web dependency for standardized error responses.
Add Micrometer Prometheus registry for modern metrics exposure.
Add Dropwizard Metrics core dependency, likely as a bridge or specific requirement.
Update Spring Boot test dependencies to exclude JUnit Vintage engine, enforcing JUnit 5 native execution.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added exclusion for org.junit.vintage:junit-vintage-engine in spring-boot-starter-test.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure Maven Compiler Plugin to use Java 11 source and target levels and manage annotation processors.
pom.xml.human_impl: Set source/target to ${java.version} and added spring-boot-configuration-processor and mapstruct-processor to annotationProcessorPaths.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure JIB Maven Plugin to build Docker images using an AdoptOpenJDK 11 base image.
Update Maven Enforcer Plugin to require Java 8-15 compatibility, explicitly supporting the migration to JDK 11.
Remove legacy Maven plugins that are no longer needed or have been replaced by standard Spring Boot/Maven features.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed maven-sortpom-plugin, gatling-maven-plugin, maven-processor-plugin, and maven-war-plugin (replaced by spring-boot-maven-plugin repackage).

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Checkstyle plugin to enforce code style rules during the build.
Add Failsafe plugin to properly handle integration tests separated from unit tests.
pom.xml.human_impl: Added maven-failsafe-plugin configured to run *IT and *IntTest classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Remove legacy 'dev' and 'fast' profiles that embedded server configuration, moving towards standard Spring Boot profiles.
pom.xml.human_impl: Removed profiles 'dev' and 'fast' which contained embedded server dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add new profiles for API documentation generation and TLS configuration.
Switch the embedded web server from Tomcat to Undertow in the production profile.
Replace the Yeoman/Grunt build process with the frontend-maven-plugin using Node.js and Webpack.
Update maven-clean-plugin filesets to remove new build artifacts (target/classes/static) instead of old ones (dist, .tmp).
Configure spring-boot-maven-plugin to generate build-info properties during the build.
Add a Maven profile to enable WAR packaging via the maven-war-plugin.
Add a Maven profile to include annotation processors (MapStruct) required for IDE support.
Add a Maven profile to configure Eclipse m2e lifecycle mapping and ignore specific plugin executions.
Add a Maven profile for end-to-end testing with specific final name and plugin management.
Add a dedicated development profile with devtools and Undertow dependencies.
Add the git-commit-id-plugin to the production build to capture git metadata.

.editorconfig.general_idea: Reorganized .editorconfig to apply specific indentation rules to frontend and config files while keeping general settings.
.editorconfig.human_impl: Moved indent_style/size to a specific glob [*.{ts,tsx,js,jsx,json,css,scss,yml,html}] with indent_size=2, and kept general indent_size=4.

.gitattributes.general_idea: Replace the minimal .gitattributes configuration with a comprehensive, community-standard template to ensure correct line-ending normalization and binary file handling across diverse file types.
.gitattributes.human_impl: Replaced `* text eol=lf` and specific extensions with `* text=auto` and a detailed list of text/binary/diff rules for various formats (scripts, docs, configs, media).

.gitignore.general_idea: Refactor .gitignore to use modern directory-only patterns and add new tool-specific ignore rules for VS Code, STS, and ESLint.
.gitignore.human_impl: Changed patterns like /node_modules/** to node_modules/ and added sections for .vscode/, /.sts4-cache/, and .eslintcache.

.yo-rc.json.general_idea: Update the JHipster generator version to 7.0.0-beta.0 to align with the Java 11 migration.
Rename the application base name to reflect the new sample application identity.
Change the Java package name to the new namespace.
Switch authentication mechanism from session-based to JWT.
Convert string-based boolean configuration values to actual booleans for newer generator compatibility.
Specify Angular as the client framework, replacing the implicit or older Grunt setup.
Explicitly define Gatling and Protractor as the test frameworks.
Add the JWT secret key configuration required for the new authentication type.
Register the BankAccount entity in the generator configuration.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the placeholder README with the standard JHipster 7.0.0-beta.0 documentation template.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced 'README for jhipster' with full JHipster development, build, and testing instructions.

package.json.general_idea: Update the required Node.js version to 14.15.0 to align with modern tooling and JDK 11 era build environments.
Replace the legacy Grunt-based build and AngularJS dependencies with Angular 11 and the Angular CLI ecosystem.
package.json.human_impl: Removed grunt, karma, requirejs; Added @angular/core, @angular/cli, webpack

package.json.general_idea: Upgrade the JHipster generator dependency from version 2.19.0 to 7.0.0-beta.0 to support the new project structure.
Replace Karma/Jasmine testing infrastructure with Jest and Protractor for end-to-end testing.
package.json.human_impl: Removed karma, jasmine-core; Added jest, protractor, @types/jest

package.json.general_idea: Introduce ESLint and Prettier for code quality and formatting, replacing older JSHint setups.
Rewrite npm scripts to use Angular CLI commands (ng build, ng serve) and Maven wrapper instead of Grunt tasks.
Add npm scripts to manage Docker containers for database and other services during development and CI.
Update package name, version, and description to reflect the specific application identity.

src/main/resources/banner.txt.general_idea: Replace the custom ASCII art banner with the standard JHipster branded banner including Spring Boot version and URL.
src/main/resources/banner.txt.human_impl: Replaced old ASCII art with new block-based JHipster logo and metadata lines.

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Introduce the jhipster namespace for framework-specific configuration properties like CORS, JWT security, and mail settings.
Refactor MongoDB configuration to use a single URI string and update the database name to match the new application identifier.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
data:
    mongodb:
      uri: mongodb://localhost:27017
      database: jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Enable Spring Boot DevTools for automatic restart and configure livereload exclusion for the development profile.
Define explicit logging levels for root, JHipster, Hibernate, and the sample application to facilitate debugging in dev mode.
src/main/resources/config/application-de.human_impl:
logging:
  level:
    ROOT: DEBUG
    tech.jhipster: DEBUG

src/main/resources/config/application-de.general_idea: Add standard Spring Boot mail properties for localhost SMTP configuration in the development environment.
Change message cache duration from integer seconds to ISO 8601 duration format as required by newer Spring Boot versions.
Include the api-docs profile in the active profiles list to enable Swagger/OpenAPI documentation generation.
Configure Jackson to indent output for better readability of JSON responses during development.
Remove deprecated metrics configuration blocks (spark, graphite) that are no longer supported or used in the new JHipster version.
Remove the explicit XHTML mode setting for Thymeleaf, relying on default HTML5 mode in newer versions.

src/main/resources/config/application-pr.general_idea: Refactor MongoDB configuration to use a single URI string instead of separate host and port properties.
Update the default MongoDB database name to match the new application identifier.
Add standard Spring Boot mail server configuration properties.
Explicitly disable Spring Boot DevTools features for the production profile.
Define explicit logging levels for root and application packages.
Configure management metrics export settings, specifically disabling Prometheus.
Enable graceful shutdown for the embedded web server.
Enable HTTP response compression for specific MIME types.
Configure JHipster-specific HTTP cache headers with a longer TTL.
Add JWT security configuration including secret key and token validity periods.
Add JHipster-specific mail base URL configuration.
Add JHipster-specific logging configuration for JSON format and Logstash.

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Replace deprecated Spring Boot 1.x management properties with Spring Boot 2.x structure.
Replace custom async pool configuration with standard Spring Boot 2.x task execution properties.
Move mail configuration from root level to standard Spring Boot 2.x spring.mail namespace.
src/main/resources/config/application.ym.human_impl: mail.host -> spring.mail.host (implied by removal of root mail block)

src/main/resources/config/application.ym.general_idea: Update Swagger documentation properties to match JHipster/Springfox 2.x naming conventions.
Enable Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes in management health endpoint.
Configure Prometheus as the default metrics export backend.
Enforce HTTP-only flag on session cookies for improved security.

src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.general_idea: Replace generic 'jhipster' branding with the specific application name 'jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication' in email templates.
Add a new i18n key for account creation email text.
src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.human_impl: email.creation.text1=Your jhipsterMongodbSampleApplication account has been created...

src/main/resources/i18n/messages_en.prop.general_idea: Update section comments in properties file to use consistent naming (e.g., 'email' instead of 'e-mail').
